description_long: This stereo sound system consists of two rectangular speaker units with a textured, black exterior resembling a rugged or pebbled finish. Each speaker features two prominent, circular metallic drivers on the front face, likely serving as a woofer and a tweeter for full-range audio output. The sides and tops of the speakers are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The front-facing drivers are set within slightly recessed, glossy black bezels, adding a subtle contrast to the matte, textured casing. The back and sides do not display any visible ports, controls, or branding, maintaining a minimalist appearance. The overall build suggests durability and suitability for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A pair of black, textured rectangular speakers with two metallic drivers each, featuring a rugged, minimalist design and no visible controls or branding.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the textured black casing and a partial glimpse of the metallic speaker drivers on one unit.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both speakers' dual metallic drivers prominently, with the textured casing visible around the edges.
description_view_2: Angled view similar to view 0, highlighting the solid sides and partial visibility of the speaker drivers.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, textured backs of both speakers with no visible features or openings.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille is not distinctly visible; the front face appears to be open with exposed metallic drivers and no mesh or perforated cover.
